title: Infinite Night Vision
description: This datapack adds infinite night vision to all players in the given world.
body:
This is a Minecraft datapack that gives all players on your world/server night vision forever.

**Warning! You can not remove the night vision effect: This datapack will keep giving night vision to all the players on your world/server!**


Watch this video to learn how to add a datapack to your Minecraft world:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J0wIEN01ABk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# Please note that we are not going to actively update this datapack, we will only update if there are some major bugs or a new minecraft version comes out.
